title: senecio sandersianus
intro: Senecio sandersianus, also known as Sanders' ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to New Zealand. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Senecio sandersianus include its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis and eczema, and its antiseptic properties may help to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to the affected area.
